proposed_description: A class of advanced set-idioms built on a pronominal stem plus an obligatory frozen tail that the context must supply: mettercela TUTTA (to give it your all), darsela A GAMBE (to leg it), legarsela AL DITO (to bear a grudge), tirarla PER LE LUNGHE (to drag it out), dirne DI TUTTI I COLORI (to give someone an earful), buttarla SUL TRAGICO (to make a drama of it), farla FINITA (to have done with it). The stem carries the pronominal mechanics (frozen clitic, feminine participle); the tail is fixed lexical material, not a slot the learner may fill freely. Label deliberately terse per Rev 12: naming the class leaks nothing, but a worked example in the label would hand over the answer.

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: Ce l'ho messa tutta. / Se l'e data a gambe.
proposed_attributes.common_miss: Agreeing the frozen tail with the subject ('ce l'ho messa tutto') or omitting it.

rationale: COMMISSIONED by Smith 2026-07-18 and authored: 11 grammar (pv_ft_* plus the re-homed pv_adv_frozentail_01) and 3 translation items now forward-reference this id, per brief §2 (forward refs permitted, strict-reject at production load). Architecture to ratify/place; if you re-parent under mechanics rather than meaning, or rename, it is a one-string re-point on my side. The frozen-TAIL agreement is a distinct diagnostic from the frozen-CLITIC agreement mechanics.sela_type already owns.
